value.prependingText:
The phone offers exceptional performance.
The camera's capabilities are impressive.
The user interface is highly intuitive.
It is exceptionally user-friendly.
Osm Camera and Performance Good Samsung S24 Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 😍
Powerful performance, excellent display,compact size and amazing camera making it an allrounder phone. The only drawback is battery life.

Camera is the main reason for my buying.
There is a heating issue.

It's camera, galaxy AI features,circle to search,high peak brightness, telephoto camera,more customization options, display,samsung inbuit apps,privacy features, sound quality i could say I'm obsessed with samsung.. i wanted to buy i phone but i don't know why i bought this...and i can say this is the best and worthy decision i've made so far...

After using S24 for 4 days am writing this review overall a good compact and a handy phone if you want a beast camera, clean UI, battery backup is slightly less but it's okay for average use if you want a mobile for daily gaming than the battery backup will be lesser.If you want good handy Samsung phone than go for it🙌
